name: Moonshot Hearts
description: A slick, animated Hearts table where dodging points feels great and taking them really stings.
rules:
OVERVIEW
Four-player Hearts. Hearts and the Queen of Spades add points. Lowest total score wins when any player reaches the target score.

ROUND FLOW
Deal 13 cards each. Passing rotates left, right, across, hold. Passing requires exactly 3 cards. The 2C holder leads first.

PLAY
Follow led suit if possible. Highest card of led suit wins the trick and leads next. First trick must start with 2C; points cannot be played on the first trick unless unavoidable. Hearts cannot be led until broken unless only hearts remain.

SCORING
Hearts are 1 point; QS is 13. Taking all 26 points shoots the moon: shooter scores 0, others score 26.
